root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)||' / '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membername ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, 0,1) as mem_address_line1 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, 0,2) as mem_address_line2 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, 0,3) as mem_address_line3 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, 0,4) as mem_address_line4 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no --ที่อยู่ coop ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,'เลขที่'||' '||sc_cnt_m_coop.address||' ต.'||sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name as coop_address_line1 ,'อ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code)||' จ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code)||' '||sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode as coop_address_line2 ,'โทร '||sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no||' โทรสาร '||sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no as coop_address_line3
,(SELECT min(receipt_no) FROM sc_com_m_receipt where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and money_type_id = 'TRB' /*WHERE*/ ) as receipt_no
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in (SELECT DISTINCT(membership_no) FROM sc_com_m_receipt where money_type_id = 'TRB' /*WHERE*/ )
order by (SELECT min(receipt_no) FROM sc_com_m_receipt where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and money_type_id = 'TRB' /*WHERE*/ )
